descriptionHtml:
Beneteau Oceanis 51.1 for sale 2018 | 5 Guest Cabins + 1 Crew Cabin | Tax Not Paid

Have a look at this Beneteau Oceanis 51.1 for sale 2018, currently available and maintained in good condition. The Oceanis 51.1 is known for its contemporary hull design, versatile layout, and excellent features for both private cruising and chartering.

Specifications:

  • Boat Type: Furling
  • Year Built: 2018
  • Cabins: 6 (4 double, 1 bunk, 1 bow cab)
  • Heads: 3+1 (Electric)
  • Length Overall (LOA): 14.97 m
  • Beam: 4.8 m
  • Draft: 1.68 m
  • Fuel Tank: 440 lt
  • Water Tank: 650 lt
  • Engine: Yanmar 4JH 110hp (approx. 4,000 hours)
  • Steering Wheels: 2
  • Sail Type: Furling
  • Plotter: Yes
  • Autopilot: B&G
  • GPS: Yes
  • Onboard Instruments: B&G
  • Bow thruster: 2020V, replaced in 2022
  • Electric Windlass: New in 2024
  • Solar Panels: 2 x 100 watt (Installed 2020)
  • Air Conditioning: 3 units (Installed 2020)
  • Generator: Onan 7kva (New in 2022)
  • Service & Engine Batteries: Replaced in 2023
  • Bimini: Yes
  • Deck Shower: Yes
  • Electric Fridge: Yes
  • Dinghy: Yes
  • Outboard: Yes

If you’re interested in a Beneteau Oceanis 51.1 for sale 2018, this yacht offers a rare blend of space, comfort, and practical upgrades. She’s in good condition, making her a strong candidate for anyone seeking a reliable, ready-to-sail yacht in this size range. Please get in touch for more details, to arrange a viewing, or for further information.
